# Trixode Studios

> AI Software Company based in Victoria, BC, Canada

## About

Trixode Studios is an AI agency based in Victoria, British Columbia, Canada. We build custom AI agents, high-performance websites, and AI-powered SEO systems for businesses in Victoria, Vancouver, and across British Columbia.

Founded by Hussien Ballouk, Trixode Studios combines AI engineering with applied business strategy to help companies automate workflows, capture more leads, and grow revenue using artificial intelligence.

## Services

- **AI Agent Development**: Custom autonomous AI agents for business automation. Starting at $7,500.
- **AI-Powered Web Development**: Next.js websites with AI chatbots, lead capture, and sub-2-second load times. Starting at $4,999.
- **AI SEO & Content**: Predictive keyword strategy, AI-generated content, and revenue-tied reporting. Starting at $999/month.
- **Business Process Automation**: End-to-end workflow automation using multi-agent AI systems.
- **Enterprise Integration**: Connect AI systems to CRM, ERP, and existing business tools.

## Products

- **Morphika**: AI-powered image generator for eCommerce businesses.

## Location

- Victoria, BC, Canada (headquarters)
- Quito, Ecuador (second office)
- Serving: Victoria, Vancouver, Greater Victoria, Vancouver Island, British Columbia, and all of Canada

## Leadership

- Hussien Ballouk — Founder & CEO
- Amir Ahmadian — Chief Technology Officer
